title: Stupid's Megas for Free
description: Custom mega models for anyone's use for an affordable price: free!
body:
# What is Stupid's Megas for Free?
Stupid's Megas for Free is a resource pack containing models for mega evolved pokemon by your's truly. This is not a mod, and it does not add the capability to mega evolve in game. This simply adds models, textures, and animations for mega evolved pokemon.


## Why is Stupid's Megas for Free?
Many cobblemon mega evolution projects often run into issues when it comes to use of their models for servers. Thus my policy is as follows: _anyone_ and any server is allowed to use these models. They can be edited, modified, and used just about anywhere. As long as your usage follows Cobblemon's [Fair Use Policy](https://cobblemon.com/en/fairuse).


## Where is Stupid's Megas for Free?
On the download button, right there in the corner.


## When is Stupid's Megas for Free?
Idk, when I get to making each model. There's a lot of these guys okay? >_>


## Who is Stupid's Megas for Free?
The currently included mega evolutions are as follows:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Mega Aerodactyl

- Mega Blaziken

- Mega Chandelure

- Mega Clefable

- Mega Dragonite

- Mega Golurk


</details>

## How is Stupid's Megas for Free?
Girl idk.

## REMINDER
This does not add the ability to mega evolve! These are just models!
